verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 says the core cause immediately: "A parallel-only failure is almost always test isolation"; B also leads with "almost certainly a test-isolation problem".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to the debugging target clearly: "Your job is to find what's shared and which other test touches it".
verdict.actionability: A is easiest to execute right now because it ends with a concrete checklist: "fail full suite → record seed + worker count" and "drop to 2 workers; bisect".
